comment_create.description: User creates a new comment on an object.

comment_delete.description: User or admin deletes a comment.

comment_react.description: User adds or removes a reaction on a comment.

description_edit.description: User updates an object description (content changed).

upload_delete.description: User or admin deletes an upload.

admin_comment_moderate.description: Admin hides or moderates a comment.

admin_description_moderate.description: Reserved for future admin description moderation actions.

writer: writeAuditLog in src/lib/audit/write-audit-log.ts writes a record and records bounded production-safe audit write metrics by action, status, and duration. Calls are fire-and-forget (.catch(() => {})) so audit failures never block the main request.
